DOUBLE MO Caf?

THE WEEKLY SQUEEKER - February 4, 2002

MO MUSIC
Note:  The Head Java Slinger will be away on her honeymoon for the next little while, so hang onto this Squeeker until March 4!

Coming up in March...
MO VINO
The next MO VINO of the season will be on Thursday, March 7th. The last MO VINO was very well attended so  make sure you get your email in soon!  Also, note that Tim Williams will be providing us with the entertainment and the cover to hang around for him is an extra $7!  It is well worth the extra money - we are very lucky to have Tim in the Double MO and his show is always great! The cost  for MO VINO is $20 per person which includes tastings of eight wines, a variety of cheeses, french baguette and your programme.  If you are interested in attending, please send an email  and let us know how many people are attending.  We get started at 7:00 Sharp!NOTE EARLIER START!

Remember, the DOUBLE MO is licensed but non-smoking.
Check out the DOUBLE MO website at www.doublemo.com  for all the music listings 
and other information about the cafe
Look forward to seeing you at these and other events at the Double MO.
